---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=25mm
      - left=22mm
      - right=22mm
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    output-file: cv
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhead[L]{Rodrigo Aguayo}
          \fancyhead[R]{Curriculum Vitae}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \usepackage{enumitem}
          \setlist{nosep,leftmargin=2em}
          \setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
          \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
---

<div class="page">

# Curriculum Vitae

<a href="cv.pdf" class="download-btn">⬇ Download PDF</a>

```{=html}
<div style="height: 1rem;"></div>
```

---

## Positions

- **2025–present**: Postdoctoral Fellow (FWO), Vrije Universiteit Brussel — ICE-BUFFER project. Global glacier buffering of streamflow droughts in a changing climate using deep learning. Supervised by Harry Zekollari.
- **2024–2025**: Postdoctoral Researcher, Vrije Universiteit Brussel — ICE³ project. Modelling the global multi-century evolution of glacier ice in 3D. Supervised by Harry Zekollari.

## Education

- **2019–2023**: PhD in Environmental Sciences, Universidad de Concepción, Chile. Thesis: Assessment of the impacts of climate change on the spatio-temporal patterns of freshwater sources to the coastal system of Western Patagonia. Supervised by Mauricio Aguayo and Jorge León.
- **2022**: Research Stay — Regional Glacier Modelling, University of Innsbruck, Austria. Seven-month stay with Fabien Maussion at the Department of Ice & Climate.
- **2017–2019**: MSc in Civil Engineering (Water Resources), Universidad de Concepción, Chile. Thesis: Impacts of anthropogenic climate change on the runoff of a trans-Andean basin in Patagonia. Supervised by Jorge León.
- **2012–2018**: Civil Engineering (Hydraulic-Environmental mention), Universidad de Concepción, Chile. Thesis: Hydrological modeling of a Patagonian basin: Application of remote sensing. Supervised by José Vargas. Approved with maximum distinction.

## Grants & Funding

- **2025–2028**: FWO Postdoctoral Junior Fellowship — ICE-BUFFER project
- **2019–2023**: ANID National Doctoral Fellowship
- **2021–2022**: ANID Operational Expenses Grant
- **2022**: ANID International Research Stay Fellowship
- **2023**: ANID Doctoral Writing Extension Fellowship

## Awards

- **2025**: Outstanding Reviewer Award, *The Cryosphere* (EGU)
- **2021**: Top 100 in Earth Science, *Scientific Reports* collection
- **2017**: Professor Edgar Pino Barrueto Prize — Best thesis of the Civil Engineering promotion

## Supervision

- **Magali Ponds** (PhD, VUB, 2024–2027) — The effect of irrigation on glacier evolution in High-Mountain Asia (co-supervised with Harry Zekollari)
- **Francesco Calista** (MSc, VUB, 2025–2026) — Implications of glacier melt in High Mountain Asia for future water security (co-supervised with Harry Zekollari and Magali Ponds)
- **Fernanda Espinoza** (MSc, UCH, 2025–2026) — Flood forecasting using deep learning in south-central Chile (co-supervised with Pablo Mendoza)
- **Maziar Freki** (MSc, VUB, 2024–2025) — Closing the regional water budget in Western Patagonia using SWOT data (co-supervised with Harry Zekollari)
- **Garance du Bus de Warnaffe** (MSc, VUB, 2024–2025) — The time of emergence of glacier runoff in Patagonia (co-supervised with Harry Zekollari)
- **Isadora Leon** (MSc, UACH, 2023–2024) — Effects of land cover on the hydrological propagation of droughts in Southern Chile (co-supervised with Jorge Leon and Alvaro Gonzalez)
- **Paul Sandoval** (Bachelor, UBB, 2021) — Potential impacts of global warming in the upper Manso River Basin

## Teaching

- **Surface Water Hydrology** — KU Leuven / Vrije Universiteit Brussel (2025–2026, 2 semesters)
- **GIS Applied to Environmental Science** — Universidad de Concepción (2023)
- **Fluid Mechanics** — Universidad de Concepción (2022)
- **Advanced Hydrology** — Universidad de Concepción (2020)
- **Distributed Hydrology** — Universidad de Concepción (2020)
- **Hydrology** — Universidad de Concepción (2016–2018, 5 semesters)
- **Introduction to Environmental Science** — Universidad de Concepción (2015)
- **Support Center for Learning Basic Sciences** — Universidad de Concepción (2014–2015, 4 semesters)

## Publications

{{< include _includes/cv-publications.md >}}

## Talks & Presentations

- **2026**: Glacio-hydrological modelling in Patagonia — EGU General Assembly (invited)
- **2023**: Assessing glacier projection uncertainties in the Patagonian Andes — V Congress of the Chilean Cryosphere Society
- **2022**: Modelling freshwater inputs to the coastal system of Western Patagonia — 6th OGGM Workshop, Norway
- **2022**: Climate datasets are the main source of uncertainty of glacier evolution — Student for Student Summerschool, Austria (invited)
- **2022**: PatagoniaMet v1.0: Una base de datos hidro-meteorológica para la Patagonia Occidental — Seminar for Strategic Planning of Water Resources in Aysén (invited)
- **2021**: PatagoniaMet: A quality check observational dataset for Western Patagonia — III Congress of the Chilean Cryosphere Society
- **2021**: PatagoniaMet: Generation and evaluation of precipitation and air temperature gridded datasets — Scientific Meeting of the Argentine Association of Geophysicists and Geodesists
- **2021**: A multi-institutional effort for an open hydrometeorological dataset in Western Patagonia — Glaciology Seminars, Center for Scientific Studies (invited)
- **2019**: The glass half-empty: Climate Change Impacts on Freshwater Input to the North Patagonia Coastal System — XXIV Chilean Congress of Hydraulic Engineering
- **2018**: Hydrological modeling of the trans-Andean basin of the Puelo River — XXVIII Latin American Hydraulics Congress, Argentina

## Datasets

- **PatagoniaMet** (2023) — Multi-source hydrometeorological dataset for Western Patagonia. DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.7992760](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7992760)
- **RGI v7.1 Lake Termini Classification** (2025) — Global mapping of lake-terminating glaciers. DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.15524733](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15524733)
- **Historical and Future Runoff in Western Patagonia** (2025) — Simulated runoff projections using hybrid glacio-hydrological modelling. DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.15076803](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15076803)
- **Glacier Runoff Projections in Patagonia** (2024) — Ensemble of glacier runoff projections for the Patagonian Andes. DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.8384882](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8384882)
- **Model-Based Runoff in Northern Patagonia** (2024) — Hydrological model outputs for Northern Patagonia catchments. DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.10949518](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10949518)

## Service

- **Reviewer** — *The Cryosphere* (2025)
- **Reviewer** — *Journal of Glaciology* (2025)
- **Reviewer** — *Hydrology and Earth System Sciences* (2025)
- **Scientific Advisor** — Predictive system for precipitation and streamflow in central-southern Chile, Universidad de Chile (2025)
- **Scientific Advisor** — Strategic Water Management Plans for Puelo, Yelcho, Aysén, Baker and Pascua Basins, GEOSAFE (2021)
- **Project Scientist** — Instrumentation and habilitation of a reference basin for snowpack studies in Aysén, CIEP (2021)
- **Hydrological Modeler and Climate Analyst** — Determination of average monthly flows in continental Chiloé, IFOP (2017)
- **Project Engineer** — Water Scenarios 2030, Fundación Chile (2017)

## Outreach & Media

- **2025**: Proyectan futuros hídricos opuestos al norte y sur de la vital Patagonia — *Diario Concepción*
- **2024**: La metamorfosis de la Patagonia chilena — *El País*
- **2024**: The world's glaciers are melting faster than we thought — *National Geographic*
- **2024**: Un adiós helado y esperado: Desaparición del último glaciar de Venezuela — *Niboe*
- **2024**: Ciencia local crea pionera base de datos de la Patagonia — *Diario Concepción*
- **2024**: Académico UCSC participó en PatagoniaMet — *UCSC*
- **2021**: Investigación analizó las consecuencias del cambio climático en los ríos de la Patagonia norte — *Ladera Sur*
- **2021**: Documentary RIO: Rivers Influencing the Ocean — *YouTube*
- **2019**: Estudio mide impacto del cambio climático en el sur de Chile — *EMOL*

## Skills

- **Programming**: Python, R, Julia, Bash, shell scripting
- **Glacier Modelling**: OGGM, PyGEM, PISM, glacier dynamics
- **Hydrological Modelling**: HBV, TETIS, WRF-Hydro, hydrological signatures
- **Deep Learning**: PyTorch, TensorFlow, LSTM, neural hydrology
- **Geospatial**: GIS, remote sensing, Google Earth Engine, QGIS
- **Tools**: Quarto, Git, LaTeX, Docker, HPC, Linux
- **Languages**: Spanish (native), English (fluent)

## Fieldwork

- **Puelo River basin, Chile** (2018–2021) — Trimestral hydrological campaigns for fjord land use change study (PI: Jorge Leon)
- **Bordu and Kara-Batkak glaciers, Kyrgyzstan** (2024) — Glacier monitoring using drones (PI: Lander Van Tricht)
- **Aysén region, Chile** (2017) — Stream surveys in old-growth temperate forests (PI: Anna Astorga and Brian Reid)

</div>
